subcodes.first_line: A person in this city was among the learned men of the Great City (Constantinople), with whom Áqá Ján maintained correspondence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شخصی در این مدینه از علمای مدینه کبیره بوده آقا جان نزد او مراوده داشت
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis
